name: Ground Beef Pie with Creamed Potato Topping
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup undiluted cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Place in an ungreased 10-inch pie plate.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
4. Pour off excess fat from meat.
5. Prepare the potato topping by following package directions for potatoes, substituting sour cream for milk.
6. Carefully spread over top of meat pie.
7. Sprinkle cheese on top.
8. Criss-cross bacon on top.
9. Broil for 10 minutes or until cheese is melted.
10. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
